text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Bye bye! Take care of yourself, ma'am! Whew, that's a relief. Time to
go back to everyone—hm?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? My pockets feel kinda light... Wait, was it in this pocket?
Hmmm?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Uh-oh... Where'd that thingy I found on the observation deck go?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I'm not seeing it anywhere. Pretty sure this is the right room,
too...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Lift your gaze to the room containing every number, for treasure
hides where the beholder lies." I believe I've thoroughly searched all
the high places in this room, but could I have missed a spot?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
We are on a time limit, so it might be smart to double-check if we've
interpreted the riddle correctly.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um... While you're doing that, is it okay if I go look for Urara? She's
taking a while to get back, so I'm a little worried...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I'll go with you. Maybe a walk is just what I need to come
up with some new ideas.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh?! It's not here either! Just where did I drop it? I gotta find it!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Ah! Thank goodness, we found you. What're you doing here, Urara?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Rice! Well you see, on my way back from the bathroom, I met a lost
old lady, so I helped her find her room.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But then I noticed that I dropped the thingy we found on the
observation deck, so I've been looking for it! Sorry, I'll find it real
quick!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Without that thingy, we won't be able to run together. And that's the
one thing I don't want to happen.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You know, I entered Tracen Academy so I could run a bunch. I wanted
to run in lots of races and have a ton of fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
How exciting a race is totally changes depending on who you're
running with, right? That's why I really want to run in the Beauty
Dream Cup.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I just know that running with you all will be a super new, super fun
experience. Can you imagine if I finished first? I'd be so, sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But to do that, I have to find that thingy first! It's gotta be somewhere
I walked past earlier.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I'll help you look for it! Because... I want to run with you too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason I wanted to be a muse was so I could make
everyone smile. And that includes you, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Let me join the search as well. No matter how important that item may
be, it wouldn't do for you to injure yourself due to needless haste.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
To avoid something like that, it's important for active Umamusume to
always maintain their best condition.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is... There's no need to do it on your own, Urara.
Why don't we start by retracing the route you took with the old lady?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
And then, the person from the hotel said the annex was connected to
the main building by a specific passage, so we went down to the first
floor—oh!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That reminds me, the old lady got tired partway, so we took a break
in the garden!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You haven't looked there yet? If so, that might just be where our item
is hiding.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Let's take a look, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yup!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Curren? Sorry, we ran into some trouble. We're currently headed
towards the hotel's central garden in search of a lost item.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You might be able to see us from the room. If I recall, the window was
facing the central... garden...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Actually, Curren? I want to test something, so could you open the
curtains and stand by the window?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
"Lift your gaze to the room containing every number, for treasure
hides where the beholder lies. The legend begins on your marks."

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
You know how the riddle says "Lift your gaze to the room?" We
thought it wanted us to look up inside the room...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: But what if it meant treasure is hidden in a place where you can look up at the room?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: There it is! Urara, I found it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, how?! There's one over here, too?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Basically, the riddle didn't want us to look up from inside the room,
but rather look up at the room.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno really outdid herself this time! ♪ Oh, I also heard why Urara
took her time getting back.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Seems like she dropped the item we got from the first riddle and was
looking for it by herself. Guess what Rice said to her when she found
out?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The whole reason I wanted to be a muse was so I could make
everyone smile. And that includes you, Urara!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Let me join the search as well. No matter how important that item may
be, it wouldn't do for you to injure yourself due to needless haste.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
To avoid something like that, it's important for active Umamusume to
always maintain their best condition.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I see... Rice treasures the smiles of those around her, and Ikuno
treasures self-maintenance to prolong her racing career.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As for Urara, she treasures each and every race, always running her
heart out for first place...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Everyone has an ideal they wish to realize. Still, how does this relate
to their desire to obtain Ms. Beauty's racewear?)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(It remains a mystery... However, I feel myself getting closer to the
answer!)

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's go meet up with the others, Fine. Just you wait—we'll solve the
final riddle in the cutest way this world's ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, you're right. Let us take on the final challenge in a way that
befits us!

text_block_list.name: Polite Staff
text_block_list.text:
You're here to challenge the final riddle, correct? Ms. Beauty
informed me that you would be coming.

text_block_list.name: Polite Staff
text_block_list.text: Now then, first... please enter the room. Whenever you're ready.

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
"Bonjour, Beauty Anshinzawa here! Congratulations on making it here,
my brilliant gemstones! ♪"

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Is she... streaming her voice from somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
"You will have ten minutes to solve the final riddle. Now, show me a
dazzling display of your beauty!"

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"The right place, at the right time. Use the photo as your hint to
acquire the chapel key!"

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: At last, the final riddle is upon us!
